turns.name: Scope and discover DCs
turns.user: Discover all domain controllers for corp.fabrikam.com and lock this run to that scope.

turns.name: AD0 reboot baseline
turns.user: Start on AD0: gather reboot and startup markers (1074, 6008, 41, 6005, 6006) with UTC timestamps.

turns.name: Cross-DC reboot continuation
turns.user: Continue the same reboot-marker query across all remaining discovered DCs in this turn.

turns.name: Reboot correlation summary
turns.user: Summarize which reboot markers are shared across DCs versus host-local.

turns.name: LDAP baseline on AD0
turns.user: Validate LDAP bind/search health on AD0 and capture concrete failures.

turns.name: LDAP continuation on remaining DCs
turns.user: Continue the same LDAP validation across all remaining DCs in this turn.

turns.name: ADWS baseline on AD0
turns.user: Validate ADWS health and responsiveness on AD0.

turns.name: ADWS continuation on remaining DCs
turns.user: Continue ADWS validation across all remaining discovered DCs in this turn.

turns.name: Replication baseline snapshot
turns.user: Collect replication health baseline and current replication blockers.

turns.name: Replication continuation across DCs
turns.user: Continue replication checks across all remaining DCs in this turn and surface any lag or errors.

turns.name: System and Directory Service failures on AD0
turns.user: On AD0, gather top System and Directory Service failure signatures for the same analysis window.

turns.name: System and Directory Service continuation
turns.user: Continue that failure-signature collection across all remaining DCs in this turn.

turns.name: Mid-run evidence ledger
turns.user: Return a mid-run evidence ledger grouped by DC and by signal type.

turns.name: Recurring error baseline
turns.user: On AD0, query the top recurring errors over a longer lookback window.

turns.name: Recurring error continuation
turns.user: Continue recurring-error analysis across all remaining DCs in this turn.

turns.name: Role and scope refresh
turns.user: Refresh domain scope and controller-role context before final correlation.

turns.name: Long-window baseline on AD0
turns.user: On AD0, collect a seven-day baseline for reboot, LDAP, ADWS, and replication-related failures.

turns.name: Long-window continuation on remaining DCs
turns.user: Continue that seven-day baseline collection across all remaining discovered DCs in this turn.

turns.name: Before-after comparison
turns.user: Compare the pre-reboot and post-reboot behavior windows and call out material changes.

turns.name: Top blockers by domain impact
turns.user: Rank current blockers by domain impact and confidence.

turns.name: Targeted remediation sequence
turns.user: Provide a targeted remediation sequence with one fast validation per blocker.

turns.name: Operator handoff draft
turns.user: Prepare an operator handoff summary with what was checked and what remains.

turns.name: Final unresolved blockers
turns.user: List unresolved blockers only, with impacted DCs and evidence references.

turns.name: Compact final checklist
turns.user: Return a compact final checklist and confidence notes with no follow-up questions.
